cpu_386_dx.name: Intel 386 DX
cpu_386_dx.description: 32-bit PC CPU. Opens the door to Mode 13h Frame Buffer tricks and raycasting voxel demos.

cpu_486_dx2_66.name: Intel 486 DX2-66
cpu_486_dx2_66.description: Doubles the internal clock. The engine behind first-generation texture-mapping demos.

cpu_pentium_100.name: Intel Pentium 100
cpu_pentium_100.description: Dual-pipeline superscalar. Chew through fixed-point 3D math without breaking a sweat.

cpu_pentium_ii_400.name: Intel Pentium II 400
cpu_pentium_ii_400.description: MMX/SSE; later paired with 3dfx Voodoo accelerators to drive 3D scenes.

cpu_athlon_700.name: AMD Athlon 700
cpu_athlon_700.description: AMD's first true enthusiast-grade contender. Loves shader-style procedural math.

cpu_pentium_iii_500.name: Intel Pentium III 500
cpu_pentium_iii_500.description: SSE intrinsics at last. Drives per-vertex transform/lighting demos.

cpu_pentium_4_3ghz.name: Intel Pentium 4 3.0 GHz (HT)
cpu_pentium_4_3ghz.description: NetBurst architecture with Hyper-Threading. Runs shader-heavy 64K intros smoothly at 60 fps.

cpu_core2_duo.name: Intel Core 2 Duo E6600
cpu_core2_duo.description: Dual-core efficiency revolution. The CPU that made real-time raymarching in 4K intros viable.

cpu_core_i7_920.name: Intel Core i7-920
cpu_core_i7_920.description: Nehalem quad-core with hyper-threading. Drives multi-threaded GPU compute demo pipelines.

cpu_ryzen_1700.name: AMD Ryzen 7 1700
cpu_ryzen_1700.description: 8-core/16-thread powerhouse. Perfect for complex procedural generation and physics-heavy effects.

cpu_core_i9_13900k.name: Intel Core i9-13900K
cpu_core_i9_13900k.description: 24-core hybrid architecture. Crushes real-time raymarching, fluid sims, and HD texture streaming.

gpu_voodoo_1.name: 3dfx Voodoo Graphics
gpu_voodoo_1.description: First consumer 3D accelerator with dedicated texture memory. Glide API era.

gpu_voodoo_2.name: 3dfx Voodoo 2 (SLI pair)
gpu_voodoo_2.description: Dual-board pass-through rendering. The knob for 800x600 megapixel terrain walks.

gpu_geforce_256.name: NVIDIA GeForce 256
gpu_geforce_256.description: Hardware transform & lighting (TnL). 32 MiB SDRAM. Era-defining release.

gpu_geforce2_gts.name: NVIDIA GeForce 2 GTS
gpu_geforce2_gts.description: A tweaked GeForce 256 with twice the fill rate. Sustained the late-3dfx era.

gpu_radeon_ddr.name: ATI Radeon DDR
gpu_radeon_ddr.description: Dual-channel DDR memory. Sturdier under 32-bit color rendering loads.

gpu_geforce_fx_5950.name: NVIDIA GeForce FX 5950 Ultra
gpu_geforce_fx_5950.description: DirectX 9.0b monster with 256 MiB DDR. First card to run pixel-shader 4K intros properly.

gpu_radeon_x800.name: ATI Radeon X800 XT
gpu_radeon_x800.description: ATI's shader flagship. 16 pixel pipelines deliver silky-smooth procedural textures.

gpu_geforce_8800_gtx.name: NVIDIA GeForce 8800 GTX
gpu_geforce_8800_gtx.description: Unified shader architecture revolution. The GPU that defined the modern demo render pipeline.

gpu_radeon_hd_4870.name: ATI Radeon HD 4870
gpu_radeon_hd_4870.description: GDDR5 memory and 800 stream processors. Pushes complex raymarched distance fields.

gpu_geforce_rtx_2080.name: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2080 Ti
gpu_geforce_rtx_2080.description: Real-time ray tracing hardware. Enables cinematic lighting in 64K intros.

gpu_radeon_rx_7900_xtx.name: AMD Radeon RX 7900 XTX
gpu_radeon_rx_7900_xtx.description: 24 GiB GDDR6 — insane texture cache for procedural megatextures.

ram_8mb_72pin.name: 8 MiB 72-pin SIMM
ram_8mb_72pin.description: Required for 64KB intros and high-color Mode-X flat buffers.

ram_32mb_dimm.name: 32 MiB 168-pin DIMM
ram_32mb_dimm.description: Enables loading 64 MiB sample banks for GUS Ultrasound on the fly.

ram_128mb_dimm.name: 128 MiB SDRAM DIMM
ram_128mb_dimm.description: Required for 4K procedural intros using per-pixel iterators.

ram_512mb_ddr.name: 512 MiB DDR DIMM
ram_512mb_ddr.description: Heavy enough for raymarched distance fields and 64 MB texture caches.

ram_1gb_ddr2.name: 1 GiB DDR2 DIMM
ram_1gb_ddr2.description: DDR2 533 MHz. The bare minimum for running GPU shader intros without swapping.

ram_4gb_ddr3.name: 4 GiB DDR3 DIMM
ram_4gb_ddr3.description: DDR3-1066. Comfortable for raymarched scenes with multi-layered textures.

ram_16gb_ddr4.name: 16 GiB DDR4 DIMM
ram_16gb_ddr4.description: DDR4-3200. The standard for HD demo productions with procedural megatextures.

ram_64gb_ddr5.name: 64 GiB DDR5 DIMM
ram_64gb_ddr5.description: DDR5-6000. Overkill for demos, but enables real-time AI-driven texture synthesis.

hdd_540mb.name: 540 MiB IDE HDD
hdd_540mb.description: Spinning-platter storage. Hold dozens of MOD samples and multiple demo sources.

hdd_4gb.name: 4 GiB UDMA-33 HDD
hdd_4gb.description: Pioneered scripting languages' source caches and frame-accurate captures.

ssd_20gb.name: 20 GiB Solid-State Drive
ssd_20gb.description: Replaces spinning rust — no seek chirps during demo recordings, ever.

hdd_500gb_sata.name: 500 GiB SATA HDD
hdd_500gb_sata.description: 7,200 RPM SATA drive. Holds hundreds of demo projects and toolchains.

ssd_256gb.name: 256 GiB SATA SSD
ssd_256gb.description: No moving parts — instant load times for 4K textures and module samples.

ssd_nvme_1tb.name: 1 TiB NVMe SSD
ssd_nvme_1tb.description: NVMe 3.5 GiB/s reads. Streams procedural textures at full resolution.

audio_sb16.name: SoundBlaster 16
audio_sb16.description: 16-bit stereo PCM at last. Multitrack modders' workhorse.

audio_gus.name: Gravis Ultrasound
audio_gus.description: Onboard wavetable memory — classic 32-voice MOD playback.

audio_gus_max.name: Gravis Ultrasound MAX
audio_gus_max.description: EMI-compatible, 1 MB sample RAM. Sample-heavy tracker modules shine here.

audio_awe32.name: SoundBlaster AWE32
audio_awe32.description: EMU8000 wavetable synth; brilliant for 64KB intros' in-house music engines.

audio_xfi.name: Creative SoundBlaster X-Fi
audio_xfi.description: X-Fi CMSS-3D upmixing. Crystal-clear tracker playback with hardware acceleration.

audio_usb_dac.name: USB Audio DAC (Hi-Res)
audio_usb_dac.description: 24-bit/192 kHz USB DAC. Flawless reproduction of tracker modules and chiptunes.

monitor_14_crt.name: 14" CRT (VGA 640x480)
monitor_14_crt.description: Magnifying glass for your Mode 13h pixel arsenal.

monitor_17_crt.name: 17" Trinitron CRT
monitor_17_crt.description: Aperture grille shader-perfect, ideal for projecting 64KB demos to a party crowd.

monitor_19_lcd.name: 19" LCD Panel
monitor_19_lcd.description: Pixel-perfect preview; the era's "production monitor" of choice for 4K intros.

monitor_24_lcd.name: 24" 1080p LCD
monitor_24_lcd.description: 1920x1080 widescreen. Finally enough pixels for side-by-side code and demo preview.

monitor_27_1440p.name: 27" 1440p IPS
monitor_27_1440p.description: 2560x1440 IPS panel. Colour-critical demo grading and pixel-perfect effect preview.

monitor_32_4k.name: 32" 4K HDR Monitor
monitor_32_4k.description: 3840x2160 HDR400. The ultimate canvas for 4K procedural intros and demos.
